rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in the component type scope for output range guarantees when bounds are concrete and features are visible.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL scope boundaries: type-level contracts must use only type-declared features, not subcomponent ports.
Ensure annex placement aligns with the hierarchical scope of the target component to maintain architectural integrity.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use boolean expressions with >= and <= to define numeric ranges in guarantees.
Declare helper predicates as bool using explicit comparisons to match the type of referenced features.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes; use only direct component features.
irrelevant_topics: assign, validator, repair, assume, guarantee clause selection, fusion insertion location
